title: Project Report: Contact Management App — Dynamics 365 CRM Consultant
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: Model-driven app for contacts and accounts with custom views, forms, and business rules on Dataverse.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Beginner)*

**Contact Management App** is a beginner-level end-to-end project for Dynamics 365 CRM Consultant. Duration: 2 weeks. Model-driven app for contacts and accounts with custom views, forms, and business rules on Dataverse. Tools: Power Apps, Dataverse.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: Custom views for active contacts
Objective: Form customization with business rules
Objective: Business rule for required phone
Objective: Quick create form for accounts
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Dynamics 365 CRM Consultant portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Dynamics 365 CRM Consultant resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Dynamics 365 CRM Consultant resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Beginner)*

Submit all final deliverables: App screenshot; Schema doc; Published app link. Skills demonstrated: Dataverse, Model-driven apps. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: App screenshot
Deliverable: Schema doc
Deliverable: Published app link
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits App screenshot and passes the rubric.
